description_long: This elderly person is depicted standing upright with arms extended outward, wearing a light blue, knee-length kurta with a subtle ribbed texture. The kurta is paired with white, fitted leggings that extend to the ankles, leaving the feet bare. The individual has a medium brown skin tone and a white cap covering the head, suggesting a traditional or cultural attire. The face is clean-shaven, with defined cheekbones and a neutral expression, and the hair is not visible under the cap. The overall build is slender, and the posture is straight, indicating a healthy, active elderly individual. The clothing is simple and unadorned, with no visible accessories or walking aids.
description: An elderly person in a light blue kurta, white leggings, and a white cap, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a slender build, bare feet, and a neutral facial expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the front of the blue kurta and white leggings, with arms extended and feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the kurta, and the fit of the leggings, with the left arm and leg in clear view.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full back of the kurta, and the alignment of the legs and arms from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the right profile of the face, the side of the kurta, and the right arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional attire consisting of a light blue, knee-length kurta with a ribbed texture, white fitted leggings, and a plain white cap. The outfit is simple and modest, with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended outward and feet flat on the ground.
attribute_hairstyle: Hair is fully covered by a plain white cap; no visible hair.
attribute_facial_features: Clean-shaven face with defined cheekbones, medium brown skin, and a neutral expression; no glasses or facial hair visible.
